requirement_topic.en: Malaysia SIRIM Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚SIRIM电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞SIRIM電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: SIRIM QAS International Sdn Bhd — the national conformity assessment body of Malaysia — administers product certification and testing for electrical equipment imported into or manufactured in Malaysia. Electrical products that fall under the Malaysian Standards (MS) mandatory certification scheme require SIRIM certification or recognition from an accepted certification body before they may be sold or installed. EV charging equipment as electrical installations falls within the regulatory scope of Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) under the Electricity Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) and the Electrical Installation Act 1994 (Act 511), requiring a Certificate of Approval (CoA) from ST before installation. The CoA process requires product compliance evidence against applicable MS IEC standards and may involve SIRIM test reports or reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories recognised by SIRIM. Importers must also confirm whether the specific EV charger HS code triggers a mandatory SIRIM product certification obligation under the Trade Descriptions Act 2011 or related orders. Exporters should verify both the SIRIM certification path and the ST CoA route for the specific product type and HS code with SIRIM or a qualified local agent before shipment.
summary.zh: SIRIM QAS International有限公司——马来西亚国家合格评定机构——管理进口或在马来西亚制造的电气设备的产品认证和测试。属于马来西亚标准（MS）强制认证计划范围内的电气产品，在销售或安装前须取得SIRIM认证或认可认证机构的认可。电动汽车充电设备作为电气安装项目，属于马来西亚能源委员会（ST）依据《1990年电力供应法》（第447法令）和《1994年电气安装法》（第511法令）的监管范围，安装前须取得ST的设备批准证书（CoA）。CoA流程要求提供符合适用MS IEC标准的产品合规证据，可能涉及SIRIM测试报告或SIRIM认可的ILAC认可实验室出具的报告。进口商还须确认具体电动汽车充电桩HS编码是否依据《2011年商品说明法》或相关令触发SIRIM强制产品认证义务。出口商在出货前应向SIRIM或合格当地代理确认具体产品类型和HS编码的SIRIM认证路径和ST CoA路径。
summary.zht: SIRIM QAS International有限公司——馬來西亞國家合格評定機構——管理進口或在馬來西亞製造的電氣設備的產品認證和測試。屬於馬來西亞標準（MS）強制認證計劃範圍內的電氣產品，在銷售或安裝前須取得SIRIM認證或認可認證機構的認可。電動汽車充電設備作為電氣安裝項目，屬於馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）依據《1990年電力供應法》（第447法令）和《1994年電氣安裝法》（第511法令）的監管範圍，安裝前須取得ST的設備批准證書（CoA）。CoA流程要求提供符合適用MS IEC標準的產品合規證據，可能涉及SIRIM測試報告或SIRIM認可的ILAC認可實驗室出具的報告。進口商還須確認具體電動汽車充電樁HS編碼是否依據《2011年商品說明法》或相關令觸發SIRIM強制產品認證義務。出口商在出貨前應向SIRIM或合格當地代理確認具體產品類型和HS編碼的SIRIM認證路徑和ST CoA路徑。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) — Malaysia — ST Certificate of Approval (CoA)
Electrical Installation Act 1994 (Act 511) — Malaysia
SIRIM QAS International — mandatory product certification scheme for electrical equipment
Trade Descriptions Act 2011 (Malaysia) — mandatory certification orders for regulated products
MS IEC 61851-1 — Malaysian adopted standard for EV conductive charging system
Customs Act 1967 (Malaysia) — import declaration and HS code requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review during SIRIM assessment or ST CoA evaluation, but it does not by itself establish SIRIM certification status, ST CoA approval, or Malaysia market access.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可在SIRIM评定或ST CoA评估过程中支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明SIRIM认证状态、ST CoA批准或马来西亚市场准入。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可在SIRIM評定或ST CoA評估過程中支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明SIRIM認證狀態、ST CoA批准或馬來西亞市場准入。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map the Malaysia importer, HS code, charger type and rated voltage, wireless or smart-metering functions, cable and coupler accessories, MS IEC safety and EMC reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, English and Malay labelling, and both the SIRIM certification path and the ST CoA route before asserting that a charger is Malaysia-ready. The SIRIM certification scope and ST CoA requirement for EV chargers should be confirmed with SIRIM QAS International or a qualified local electrical engineer for the specific product and HS code before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩可进入马来西亚前，应明确马来西亚进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型和额定电压、无线或智能计量功能、电缆及耦合器附件、ILAC认可实验室出具的MS IEC安全/EMC报告、英语和马来语标签，以及SIRIM认证路径和ST CoA路径。应在出货前向SIRIM QAS International或合格当地电气工程师确认具体产品和HS编码的SIRIM认证适用范围和ST CoA要求。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入馬來西亞前，應明確馬來西亞進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型和額定電壓、無線或智能計量功能、電纜及耦合器附件、ILAC認可實驗室出具的MS IEC安全/EMC報告、英語和馬來語標籤，以及SIRIM認證路徑和ST CoA路徑。應在出貨前向SIRIM QAS International或合格當地電氣工程師確認具體產品和HS編碼的SIRIM認證適用範圍和ST CoA要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — ST CoA is mandatory for EV charging equipment installations under Act 447; SIRIM certification applies to electrical products within the mandatory certification scheme; exact scope for EV charger HS code should be verified with SIRIM or ST for the specific product type before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence and China CCC are not SIRIM certification or ST CoA substitutes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Malaysia market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the SIRIM certification scope and ST CoA route for the specific product HS code with SIRIM or a qualified local electrical engineer, and address MS IEC safety/EMC evidence, English/Malay labelling, connector redesign, and TNB supply-connection requirements separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足马来西亚市场准入。应向SIRIM或合格当地电气工程师核实具体产品HS编码的SIRIM认证适用范围和ST CoA路径，并分别处理MS IEC安全/EMC证据、英语/马来语标签、接口重新设计和TNB供电接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足馬來西亞市場准入。應向SIRIM或合格當地電氣工程師核實具體產品HS編碼的SIRIM認證適用範圍和ST CoA路徑，並分別處理MS IEC安全/EMC證據、英語/馬來語標籤、接口重新設計和TNB供電接入要求。

requirement_topic.en: Malaysia EV Policy — National Electric Mobility Blueprint 2021–2030 and MyHIJAU Green Ecosystem
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚电动汽车政策——《国家电动出行蓝图2021—2030》与MyHIJAU绿色生态系统
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞電動汽車政策——《國家電動出行藍圖2021—2030》與MyHIJAU綠色生態系統

summary.en: Malaysia's EV adoption is driven by the National Electric Mobility Blueprint 2021–2030, which targets 15% of total industry volume (TIV) for EVs by 2030, and the Low Carbon Mobility Blueprint (LCMB). The Ministry of Investment, Trade and Industry (MITI) and the Ministry of Energy Transition and Water Transformation (METWT) jointly oversee EV and charging infrastructure policy. ChargEV — operated by TNB Electron — is the primary public EV charging network. The MyHIJAU (Green Malaysia) programme administered by the Green Technology and Climate Change Corporation (MGTC) provides green labelling and incentive eligibility for EV charging equipment that meets defined sustainability and efficiency criteria. EV charger importers and installers may be eligible for import duty exemptions under the national EV incentive programme for qualifying EV charging equipment, subject to customs authority confirmation. The government EV push creates procurement demand for IEC-standard, OCPP-capable charging equipment from both public-sector infrastructure projects and private operators, but does not automatically reduce conformity assessment, ST CoA, or SIRIM obligations.
summary.zh: 马来西亚电动汽车推广由《国家电动出行蓝图2021—2030》推动，目标是到2030年电动汽车占总行业销量（TIV）的15%，以及《低碳出行蓝图》。投资、贸易及工业部（MITI）和能源转型与水资源转型部（METWT）共同监督电动汽车和充电基础设施政策。ChargEV——由TNB Electron运营——是主要的公共电动汽车充电网络。由绿色科技与气候变化公司（MGTC）管理的MyHIJAU（绿色马来西亚）计划为符合既定可持续性和效率标准的电动汽车充电设备提供绿色标签和激励资格。电动汽车充电桩进口商和安装商在取得海关当局确认后，符合条件的电动汽车充电设备可享受国家电动汽车激励计划下的进口税豁免。政府主导的电动汽车推广为公共部门基础设施项目和私营运营商对IEC标准、支持OCPP的充电设备采购创造了需求，但不会自动减少合格评定、ST CoA或SIRIM义务。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞電動汽車推廣由《國家電動出行藍圖2021—2030》推動，目標是到2030年電動汽車佔總行業銷量（TIV）的15%，以及《低碳出行藍圖》。投資、貿易及工業部（MITI）和能源轉型與水資源轉型部（METWT）共同監督電動汽車和充電基礎設施政策。ChargEV——由TNB Electron運營——是主要的公共電動汽車充電網絡。由綠色科技與氣候變化公司（MGTC）管理的MyHIJAU（綠色馬來西亞）計劃為符合既定可持續性和效率標準的電動汽車充電設備提供綠色標籤和激勵資格。電動汽車充電樁進口商和安裝商在取得海關當局確認後，符合條件的電動汽車充電設備可享受國家電動汽車激勵計劃下的進口稅豁免。政府主導的電動汽車推廣為公共部門基礎設施項目和私營運營商對IEC標準、支持OCPP的充電設備採購創造了需求，但不會自動減少合格評定、ST CoA或SIRIM義務。

standards_or_laws: National Electric Mobility Blueprint 2021–2030 — Malaysia
Low Carbon Mobility Blueprint (LCMB) — Malaysia
MyHIJAU (Green Malaysia) programme — MGTC green labelling and incentive criteria
ChargEV network — TNB Electron public EV charging programme
Malaysia EV import duty exemption programme — subject to customs confirmation
Ministry of Energy Transition and Water Transformation (METWT) EV charging infrastructure guidelines

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related state grid and charging-station standards. China's domestic push does not translate into automatic Malaysia market access; Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy Malaysia conformity (SIRIM / ST CoA), connector (IEC 62196), grid (240 V / TNB), and project requirements even when their home-market volumes are large.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关国家电网和充电站标准管理。中国国内推广不能自动转换为马来西亚市场准入；中国制造商即便国内销量很大，仍须单独满足马来西亚的合格评定（SIRIM / ST CoA）、接口（IEC 62196）、电网（240 V / TNB）和项目要求。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關國家電網和充電站標準管理。中國國內推廣不能自動轉換為馬來西亞市場准入；中國製造商即便國內銷量很大，仍須單獨滿足馬來西亞的合格評定（SIRIM / ST CoA）、接口（IEC 62196）、電網（240 V / TNB）和項目要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Malaysia's EV policy creates procurement opportunity but does not waive technical or conformity requirements. Chinese exporters should monitor ChargEV and METWT tender announcements, confirm project specifications (including OCPP version, connector type, IP rating, and TNB load requirements) before bidding, verify import duty exemption eligibility with Malaysia customs for the specific HS code, and allocate lead time for IEC testing, connector redesign, SIRIM certification, ST CoA, and TNB supply-connection documentation. MyHIJAU green labelling may provide a procurement preference advantage for qualifying products.
gap.zh: 马来西亚电动汽车政策创造了采购机会，但不豁免技术或合格评定要求。中国出口商应关注ChargEV和METWT的招标公告，在投标前确认项目规范（包括OCPP版本、接口类型、IP防护等级和TNB负载要求），就具体HS编码向马来西亚海关核实进口税豁免资格，并为IEC测试、接口重新设计、SIRIM认证、ST CoA和TNB供电接入文件预留交货期。MyHIJAU绿色标签可为符合条件的产品提供采购优先优势。
gap.zht: 馬來西亞電動汽車政策創造了採購機會，但不豁免技術或合格評定要求。中國出口商應關注ChargEV和METWT的招標公告，在投標前確認項目規範（包括OCPP版本、接口類型、IP防護等級和TNB負載要求），就具體HS編碼向馬來西亞海關核實進口稅豁免資格，並為IEC測試、接口重新設計、SIRIM認證、ST CoA和TNB供電接入文件預留交貨期。MyHIJAU綠色標籤可為符合條件的產品提供採購優先優勢。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity requirements under ST, SIRIM, and TNB remain in force independently; MyHIJAU labelling is voluntary but may be required by specific procurement programmes
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Malaysia conformity obligations

source.publisher: Ministry of Investment, Trade and Industry Malaysia (MITI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Malaysia's EV policy creates real procurement demand for IEC-standard, OCPP-capable chargers. Chinese exporters should treat the policy as a market signal, not a conformity shortcut, and ensure product (SIRIM / ST CoA), connector (IEC 62196), grid (240 V / TNB), and project documentation are each addressed before entering Malaysia tenders or ChargEV network deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马来西亚电动汽车政策为IEC标准、支持OCPP的充电桩创造了真实采购需求。中国出口商应将该政策视为市场信号而非合规捷径，在参与马来西亚招标或ChargEV网络部署前，确保产品（SIRIM / ST CoA）、接口（IEC 62196）、电网（240 V / TNB）和项目文件各项均已妥善处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬來西亞電動汽車政策為IEC標準、支持OCPP的充電樁創造了真實採購需求。中國出口商應將該政策視為市場信號而非合規捷徑，在參與馬來西亞招標或ChargEV網絡部署前，確保產品（SIRIM / ST CoA）、接口（IEC 62196）、電網（240 V / TNB）和項目文件各項均已妥善處理。
